permissions.fallback_msg: This skill needs to read local files such as benchmark datasets, evaluation scripts, and reference documents. Allow read access within the workspace?
This skill needs to write evaluation results, generated metrics reports, and evaluation harness files to the workspace. Allow write access?
This skill needs to read existing source code files (e.g., evaluation scripts, model code) to run or extend evaluations. Allow source code read access?
This skill needs to create or modify evaluation scripts, benchmark runners, and metric implementations. Allow source code write access?
This skill needs to execute Python evaluation scripts and automated benchmark runners. Allow shell execution?
This skill may need to install Python packages such as nltk, rouge-score, bert-score, scipy, sklearn, transformers, and detoxify. Allow package installation?
This skill calls external LLM APIs (e.g., OpenAI ChatCompletion with gpt-5) for LLM-as-Judge evaluation patterns. Allow external API calls?
This skill needs to read API keys (e.g., OpenAI API key) to authenticate calls to external LLM judge services. Allow reading secrets/credentials?
This skill may create an interactive Python REPL session to run evaluation code interactively. Allow REPL session creation?
This skill executes evaluation code (metrics calculations, benchmark runs, statistical tests) inside a REPL session. Allow REPL code execution?
This skill reads output and computed metric results from REPL sessions. Allow reading REPL output?
This skill performs outbound network requests to download pre-trained models (e.g., DeBERTa) and contact external LLM judge APIs. Allow outbound network access?
